features: Permanent hold - ensures lasting hold without residue
Odor protection: invisible formula prevents sweat odor

description: Product Description The Invisible Antiperspirant is enriched with mineralite, a naturally absorbent mineral of volcanic origin and provides the skin with up to 48 hours of protection against sweat Directions Use on the armpit area
